interaction.prompt: DZ coverage. RW just lost the wall battle and the puck is at the strong-side corner with their forward. As C, tap your spot.

feedback.right: Slot — center always owns the slot. That's where shots and rebounds come from; don't drift to help on the wall.
feedback.wrong: Don't help on the wall — that's the wing's job. Center stays in the slot, stick on the dangerous shooter.

tip: DZ rule for centers: own the slot. The wall is the wings' job; the points are the D's job.
why: Defensive-zone coverage breaks when players poach. Centers who help on the wall leave the most dangerous ice unguarded.
